meta.provenance: FLSRI analysis lab, trend & momentum workstream (Theil-Sen slopes on standardized 0-1 risk scale, 12-year window, threshold 0.0025/yr with CI excluding zero; deterministic, no RNG)
meta.note: Momentum reads describe the underlying sources, which can lag abrupt events; they are descriptive trend estimates of structural conditions, not forecasts, and are not part of the published score.
